steps.name: workspace-setup
steps.summary: tools/harness workspace 부트스트랩, tsx/vitest/eslint devDep 설치, 빈 execute.ts 스텁

steps.name: git-helper
steps.summary: git/commands.ts: runGit/checkoutBranch/commitStaged/twoStageCommit + tmpdir 기반 실물 git 테스트 7종

steps.name: claude-invoker
steps.summary: claude/invoker.ts: spawnSync 기반 invokeClaude + 결과 writeJson 저장 + mock bash로 3케이스 테스트

steps.name: ac-verifier
steps.summary: verify/ac.ts: parseACFromStep (## Acceptance Criteria 첫 bash 펜스) + runACCommands (bash -lc, 5분 타임아웃) + 8 테스트

steps.name: orchestrator
steps.summary: orchestrator/blocker.ts(checkBlockers) + loop.ts(executeAllSteps/executeSingleStep, 3회 재시도, Trust-but-Verify, 주입형 DI) + execute.ts runHarness 조립 + 10 테스트 (46 total)

steps.name: cli-root-integration
steps.summary: execute.ts에 parseArgv/runHarness(options+deps)/CLI entry guard + 루트 package.json harness 스크립트 + tsx devDep + 10 테스트 (56 total)

steps.name: slash-command-and-docs
steps.summary: .claude/commands/harness.md 신규 + docs/_template phases 스켈레톤 추가 + progress.txt/feature_list.json 레거시 제거 + docs/plans-index.json 시드 + CLAUDE.md 1줄 안내
